title: aster elatus
intro: Aster elatus, also known as the starflower or tall aster, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its tall stem and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Aster elatus include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, reducing inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Aster elatus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
